summary: Iteration 92: Outlet Selection and Kitchen Equipment Tracking feature fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional - outlet dropdown populated with 12 outlets (11+ from admin onboarding + equipment-linked), equipment dropdown appears for equipment/kitchen/maintenance categories and correctly filters by selected outlet (11 items for Main Kitchen, 5 for Pastry Shop). Ticket table shows 'Outlet' column with outlet name and equipment name displayed.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test tickets via POST /api/concierge/guest-report during testing with outlet_id and equipment_id fields. Test tickets prefixed with 'TEST_' include: Walk-In Cooler temp alarm, Fryer malfunction, Food quality issue, Maintenance issue, Verify ticket fields, Deck Oven temperature issue, Report Issue Tab Equipment Test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 verified the outlet selection and kitchen equipment tracking features in Echo Concierge. Key findings: (1) GET /api/concierge/outlets returns 12 outlets (5 from admin onboarding + 6 equipment-linked outlets + 1 main-kitchen). (2) GET /api/concierge/equipment returns 24 items total, filters correctly by outlet_id (11 for out-main-kitchen, 5 for out-pastry-shop). (3) POST /api/concierge/guest-report accepts outlet_id, equipment_id, equipment_name fields. (4) Category 'equipment' routes to engineering department. (5) Frontend: New Ticket form has outlet dropdown (data-testid='new-ticket-outlet'), equipment dropdown (data-testid='new-ticket-equipment') appears for equipment/kitchen/maintenance categories. (6) Report Issue tab has outlet select (data-testid='report-outlet') and equipment select (data-testid='report-equipment'). (7) Ticket table has 'Outlet' column showing outlet name with equipment name below it in cyan color.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/concierge/outlets - structure validation (outlet_id, name, type, location)
GET /api/concierge/equipment - structure validation (equipment_id, name, outlet_id, type, make, model, location)
POST /api/concierge/guest-report with outlet_id and equipment_id creates ticket correctly
POST /api/concierge/guest-report with category='equipment' routes to engineering
POST /api/concierge/guest-report with category='kitchen' routes to culinary
POST /api/concierge/guest-report with category='maintenance' routes to engineering
GET /api/concierge/tickets returns tickets with outlet_id and equipment_name fields
frontend_tests: Echo Concierge panel opens from taskbar (data-testid='taskbar-echo-concierge')
Tickets tab: '+ New Ticket' button visible (data-testid='new-ticket-btn')
Tickets tab: Outlet dropdown present (data-testid='new-ticket-outlet') with 12 options
Tickets tab: Equipment dropdown appears for 'equipment' category (data-testid='new-ticket-equipment')
Tickets tab: Equipment dropdown filters by selected outlet (11 for Main Kitchen, 5 for Pastry Shop)
Tickets tab: Ticket creation with outlet and equipment works end-to-end
Tickets tab: 'Outlet' column visible in ticket table with outlet name and equipment name
Report Issue tab: Outlet dropdown present (data-testid='report-outlet')
Report Issue tab: Equipment dropdown appears for equipment category (data-testid='report-equipment')
Report Issue tab: Equipment filters by selected outlet
Report Issue tab: Ticket creation works

outlets_endpoint.details: GET /api/concierge/outlets returns 12 outlets including admin-seeded (main-dining, banquet-hall, etc.) and equipment-linked (out-main-kitchen, out-pastry-shop, etc.)

equipment_endpoint.details: GET /api/concierge/equipment returns 24 items, correctly filters by outlet_id query parameter

ticket_creation_with_outlet_equipment.details: POST /api/concierge/guest-report accepts outlet_id, equipment_id, equipment_name fields and stores them correctly

category_routing.details: Category 'equipment' routes to engineering, 'kitchen' routes to culinary, 'maintenance' routes to engineering

frontend_outlet_dropdown.details: Outlet dropdown in both Tickets tab (new-ticket-outlet) and Report Issue tab (report-outlet) populated with outlets from API

frontend_equipment_dropdown.details: Equipment dropdown appears for equipment/kitchen/maintenance categories, filters by selected outlet

ticket_table_outlet_column.details: Ticket table has 'Outlet' column showing outlet name with equipment name displayed below in cyan color
